description.content: Operations for accessing commits and commit history
Returns a list of commits in a repository. Supports filtering by branch, author, date range, file path, and commit message text. Results are sorted by commit date (newest first by default).

query.description: (Required) Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.
Branch, tag, or commit SHA to start listing from
Filter by commit author name or email
Return commits after this date
Return commits before this date
Filter commits that touched this file or folder path
Maximum number of commits to return
Number of commits to skip (for pagination)

REST API for managing Git repositories, branches, commits, pull requests, and pushes in Azure Repos. Supports full programmatic control over source code hosted in Azure DevOps, including creating and reviewing pull requests, managing branches, and browsing repository content.
